ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the repository */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the repository has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the repository is released */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers for the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository on GitHub */,
  "languages_url" TEXT /* URL to fetch programming languages used in the repository */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Array of topics or tags associated with the repository */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository in kilobytes */,
  "open_issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the repository */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository is archived */,
  "is_disabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository is disabled */,
  "has_wiki" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository has a wiki */,
  "has_pages" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository has GitHub Pages */,
  "has_downloads" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the repository allows downloads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the contributor is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "contributions" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the contributor's avatar */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the contributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the contributor */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the contributor */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the contributor works for */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the contributor has on GitHub */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the contributor follows on GitHub */,
  "public_repos" INTEGER /* Number of public repositories the contributor has */,
  "public_gists" INTEGER /* Number of public gists the contributor has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object to store user preferences (e.g., notification settings, theme preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the repository to favorites */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository added to favorites */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
